quiz.question:
White has pushed their pawn to e6.

The pawn on b2 is free to capture now, but White would recapture on b4 next.

Should we go for this trade?

answers.text: No, because Wihite's b2-pawn is weak and we could try to capture it later without losing any material.

feedback.text: That's right! White doesn't have a good way of protecting the b2-pawn — improving minor pieces is the way to go here (...Nc6).

distractors.text: Yes, because we get rid of the potential passed b-pawn, and our pieces will prove to be stronger than the rook in the endgame.

feedback.text: Although this isn't a mistake, by trading for our b4-pawn we give White more drawing chances.
